name_cn:
Top-tier, comes with full packaging
Latest color D-JOY patent leather creamy white in stock!!️
Brand new D-joy medium patent leather, a huge hit 🔥, comes with two shoulder straps, multiple ways to carry 🙋🏻‍♀️, looks beautiful and chic, classic quilted design 🥅, paired with glossy patent leather, elegant and stylish 🌿
size:26*6*14cm
